headline: Starbucks (SBUX) Is Closing Korea Stores For Staff Training After Marketing Backlash
summary: Starbucks Korea, a unit of NasdaqGS:SBUX, plans to temporarily close all stores nationwide for staff training on historical awareness and social sensitivity. The move follows public backlash after a marketing campaign was viewed as insensitive to a key moment in South Korea’s democratic history. The company also announced new internal protocols aimed at improving cultural and historical awareness in future marketing decisions. For investors tracking Starbucks, Korea is one of the company’s...
